text:
(In reply to Jean-Sebastien Pedron from comment #15)
> Good news for you: Tijl Coosemans added AGP support to FreeBSD 11-CURRENT.
> 
> Could you please try it and report back here?

It's sound like good reason for me for wanting FreeBSD 10.2
but isn't totally actual since you switched to gallium architecture basic acceleration work fine for example Firefox 0/2(1?) but work and not blocked anymore.
Maybe I will try 10 -STABLE than have more time.
